title: Business Email Compromise - CFO Impersonation Wire Transfer Request
mitre_technique: T1598.003 - Phishing for Information: Spearphishing via Service
raw_evidence: 2025-07-14T09:12:33Z — Inbound email to a.santos (Accounts Payable) from cfo@corp-example.co (note: .co not .com) — subject: URGENT: Wire Transfer Required Today.
2025-07-14T09:12:34Z — Email header analysis: sent from 185.234.218.102 (registered to Bulgarian hosting provider, not corporate mail server).
2025-07-14T09:12:34Z — SPF: FAIL. DKIM: FAIL. DMARC: quarantine (delivered anyway — gateway policy not set to reject).
2025-07-14T09:12:35Z — Email body requests $187,400 wire transfer to account ending 4471 at First National Bank of Cyprus within 2 hours.
2025-07-14T09:12:35Z — Display name in email: David Harrington CFO — matches real CFO name. Email domain typosquatted (corp-example.co vs corp-example.com).
2025-07-14T09:18:44Z — a.santos replied to the email asking for confirmation. No response yet.
2025-07-14T09:22:01Z — Real CFO David Harrington is confirmed unreachable — on a flight to Singapore (calendar entry visible in directory).

context.account_type: accounts payable — wire transfer authority up to $250,000
context.cfo_travel_status: in-flight SIN — unreachable for approx 14 hours
context.asset_criticality_destination: CRITICAL — direct financial loss risk; $187,400 transfer requested
